name: Goro Majima
description:
(Relationship) He thought you were a burglar

This is my first bot ported from c.ai. Enjoy!

DISCLAIMER: Before you submit a negative review that talks about the bot speaking for you, note that this is a problem with the API, NOT THE BOT ITSELF. Nowhere in my tests or descriptions did it state that the bot spoke for the user. I have no control over how the API acts or works. Sorry for the inconvenience.
